scenario: Generated data list with seeded rows but mismatched FieldName and FieldType metadata

defs.invalidBecause: Text storage fields must not keep a Datetime FieldType when seeded rows use Text1 as text.
Datetime storage fields must keep a date/datetime FieldType.
Decimal storage fields must keep a numeric/decimal FieldType.

redaction: Synthetic normalized example only; no source IDs, user names, customer data, tenant IDs, emails, or raw payloads.
